---
title: "Session 2: Movement + Problem Patterns"
subtitle: "Make Something Move"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, ../slides_template/assets/sdaia.scss]
    transition: slide
    background-transition: fade
    slide-number: true
    controls: true
    progress: true
    center-title-slide: true
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-background-image: "../slides_template/assets/anim.svg"
      data-background-opacity: "0.08"
      data-background-size: "cover"
---

# Session 2 {.sdaia-dark background-gradient="linear-gradient(135deg, #1C355E, #00C9A7)"}

Movement + Problem Patterns — Make Something Move

## Agenda

- **Part 1** — The Danger of Motors
- **Part 2** — Tinkercad Simulation
- **Part 3** — The Physical Build
- **Part 4** — Programming Movement
- **Part 5** — The IR Remote
- **Part 6** — Obstacle Course & AI Demo
- **Part 7** — Problem Patterns (Closing)

{{< include session2/part1-the-danger-of-motors.qmd >}}

{{< include session2/part2-tinkercad-simulation.qmd >}}

{{< include session2/part3-the-physical-build.qmd >}}

{{< include session2/part4-coding-movement.qmd >}}

{{< include session2/part5-ir-remote.qmd >}}

{{< include session2/part6-obstacle-and-ai.qmd >}}
